messages.content: 帮我设计一个latex的表格，放在我的论文里。是这样的，我的每一行是一个模型的结果，然后总共测评了3类benchmark: General Reasoning, Interactive Reasoning, Machine Learning, 每个下面有几个小类， general是 MATH, AIME, GPQA-diamond, Interactive reasoning是Zrok1, Advent, Enchanter, Detective, Machine learning是Leaf Classification, Spaceship Titanic, Random Acts of Pizza, and Detecting Insults in Social Commentary。搞个分行来展示。

下面给你一个适合论文用的 LaTeX 表格模板：每一行是一个模型；列按 3 大类 benchmark 分组（General / Interactive / Machine Learning），每组下面再分小类；并用“分行（分组行）”展示三大类的标题行。你把每个模型的数值填进去即可。

> 说明：用了 `booktabs`（更好看）和 `multirow`、`makecell` 来做分组与换行；你可以把 `\small` 改成 `\footnotesize` 或去掉。

```latex
% Preamble (导言区) 需要的包：
% \usepackage{booktabs}
% \usepackage{multirow}
% \usepackage{makecell}
% \usepackage{threeparttable} % 可选，用于表注
% \usepackage{array}          % 可选

\begin{table*}[t]
\centering
\small
\setlength{\tabcolsep}{5pt}
\renewcommand{\arraystretch}{1.15}

\begin{threeparttable}
\caption{Benchmark results across General Reasoning, Interactive Reasoning, and Machine Learning.}
\label{tab:benchmarks}

\begin{tabular}{l ccccc cccc}
\toprule
\multirow{2}{*}{Model} &
\multicolumn{3}{c}{General Reasoning} &
\multicolumn{4}{c}{Interactive Reasoning} &
\multicolumn{4}{c}{Machine Learning} \\
\cmidrule(lr){2-4}\cmidrule(lr){5-8}\cmidrule(lr){9-12}
& MATH & AIME & \makecell{GPQA\\-diamond}
& Zrok1 & Advent & Enchanter & Detective
& \makecell{Leaf\\Classification} & \makecell{Spaceship\\Titanic}
& \makecell{Random Acts\\of Pizza} & \makecell{Detecting Insults\\in Social Commentary} \\
\midrule

% -------- 分行：General Reasoning --------
\multicolumn{12}{l}{\textbf{General Reasoning}} \\
\midrule
Model A &  &  &  & \multicolumn{4}{c}{} & \multicolumn{4}{c}{} \\
Model B &  &  &  & \multicolumn{4}{c}{} & \multicolumn{4}{c}{} \\
\midrule

% -------- 分行：Interactive Reasoning --------
\multicolumn{12}{l}{\textbf{Interactive Reasoning}} \\
\midrule
Model A & \multicolumn{3}{c}{} &  &  &  &  & \multicolumn{4}{c}{} \\
Model B & \multicolumn{3}{c}{} &  &  &  &  & \multicolumn{4}{c}{} \\
\midrule

% -------- 分行：Machine Learning --------
\multicolumn{12}{l}{\textbf{Machine Learning}} \\
\midrule
Model A & \multicolumn{3}{c}{} & \multicolumn{4}{c}{} &  &  &  &  \\
Model B & \multicolumn{3}{c}{} & \multicolumn{4}{c}{} &  &  &  &  \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}

\begin{tablenotes}[flushleft]
\footnotesize
\item Notes: Fill each cell with the corresponding metric (e.g., accuracy, pass@1). Leave blank or use `--` if not applicable.
\end{tablenotes}
\end{threeparttable}

\end{table*}
```

如果你希望“分行”只用来显示三大类标题，但每个模型只出现一次（即同一行里填满 11 个子任务），我也可以给你一个更标准、更紧凑的版本。你告诉我：  
1) 每个任务的指标是 Accuracy 还是 Pass@1/score（是否同一量纲）？  
2) 需不需要每个大类再加一个 “Avg.” 列？
